name: Example
title: Example quiz deck - copy this file to e.g. basic.json and fill with real questions

questions.question: What type of consensus mechanism does Redbelly Network use?
questions.explanation: Redbelly Network uses DBFT, which gives deterministic finality and tolerates up to one-third malicious nodes.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of Redbelly's consensus algorithm?
questions.explanation: DBFT provides fast, deterministic finality compared to probabilistic consensus.
